_comment: Quaternius Universal Animation Library (UAL2) map. UAL2 ships an Unreal-style rig (pelvis, spine_01/02/03, upperarm_l, lowerarm_l, thigh_l, calf_l, etc.) — distinct from the older UAL1 Mixamo-flavored bone names handled by quaternius.json. Source is A-pose so upper-arm restDeltas pull the arms back toward our T-pose. Clavicle and upperarm both map onto upper_arm_l/r; the converter warns and last-wins (upperarm wins, which is what we want — the dominant rotation).
